--- Main Page ---
Corsair Distillery & Taproom at Marathon | Book A Tour & Tastings
Skip to content
MARATHON
DISTILLERY & TAPROOM
Marathon Distillery & Taproom
DISTILLERY TOURS, SPIRITS TASTINGS,
CRAFT COCKTAILS, LOCAL BEERS & CORSAIR SPIRITS
Book A Tour & Tasting
Corsair Distillery at Marathon is l
ocated within the bustling Marathon Village. Our
first Nashville location is both an active distillery and taproom with local beers, cocktail bar, fresh baked pizzas plus a tasting bar and bottle shop. Home of our pre-prohibition pot still and former home to our intrepid distillery cat, Pizza. RIP!
WHAT IS AVAILABLE?
– Distillery tours with spirits tastings
– Guided spirits tasting flights
– Bottle shop and gift shop
– Taproom & Bar:
craft cocktails
local beers
fresh baked pizza
Distillery Tour & Tasting
Corsair’s tours include a 30 minute distillery walking tour about the history of Corsair and how we make our unique grain-to-glass spirits.
Tours also include:
– A close look at the core distillery production space featuring our 1920’s pot still, condensing stills, fermentation vessels, mash cooker, and pilot gin still.
– Five tastings of spirits, selected by your guide. Non-tasting options are available.
Maximum tour capacity is currently limited to 14 people.
We can accommodate larger single groups with coordination. Please email us in advance to make arrangements.
Tour With Tasting: $18
Tour Without Tasting: $10
Children Under 12: FREE
Guided Spirits Tastings
Want to try a flight of our spirits and learn how we make them? Just walk on in and ask for a guided tasting. During this tasting your group will be stepped through the flavors, production, and backstory of five Corsair spirits.
A dedicated guide will walk you though the spirits.
1200 Clinton St. #110
Nashville, TN 37203

meta.meta_description: Corsair's first Nashville location is both an active distillery and microbrewery, as well as a cocktail bar, taproom, and bottle shop. Tours daily.
